questions.question: Describe the main difference between the Planning Poker and T-Shirt Sizing estimation techniques. (10 marks)
An empirical estimation model uses historical data from which of the following sources to make predictions about future projects? (5 marks)
A study on the use of historical data in estimation found that using only a single estimation technique can lead to overestimation. What strategies can be employed to mitigate this issue? (10 marks)
